top_signals.title: Stocks Waver as SK Hynix Rallies in Trading Debut: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A rally that drove stocks to a striking distance of their record highs wavered ahead of the earnings season, with SK Hynix Inc. jumping in its debut and the market also parsing the latest geopolitical developments.
